prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, Mira Ledgerfall in a navy cloak with gold trim and Ari Moonvale in reinforced leather armor stand at a wooden table. Mira unrolls a parchment quest map and points to a mountain pass. Bright anime aesthetic, cinematic medium shot, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ari Moonvale nods with a determined expression, placing her finger on the map to confirm the route. Mira Ledgerfall closes her ribboned ledger and hands it to Ari, finalizing the commission. Consistent characters and camera, no text, no watermark.
